raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"user_profile","confidence":0.89,"matched_text":"you mentioned you only started training for the 5K run about six weeks ago","distilled_fact":"The user started training for the 5K run about six weeks ago."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"assistant_profile","confidence":0.97,"matched_text":"I'm a beginner","distilled_fact":"The assistant is a beginner."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"assistant_preference","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"I want to make sure the plan is challenging enough to help me progress, but not so intense that I risk injury or burnout.","distilled_fact":"The assistant prefers a strength training plan that is challenging enough to promote progress but not so intense that it risks injury or burnout."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"assistant_preference","confidence":0.91,"matched_text":"I'd love to get your expert opinion on the exercises, sets, reps, and weights we've discussed so far.","distilled_fact":"The assistant wants expert opinion on the exercises, sets, reps, and weights discussed so far."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"assistant_preference","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"I'd like to explore ways to incorporate more functional exercises that will help me with my running and soccer performance.","distilled_fact":"The assistant would like to incorporate more functional exercises to help with running and soccer performance."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"assistant_preference","confidence":0.89,"matched_text":"Perhaps we could add some plyometric exercises, agility drills, or even some yoga or stretching exercises to improve my flexibility and mobility.","distilled_fact":"The assistant would like to add plyometric exercises, agility drills, yoga exercises, or stretching exercises to improve flexibility and mobility."}]}
